---
title: "Yang Xun"
about: 
  template: trestles
  image: static/img/profile_pic_warwick.jpg
  #links:
  #  - icon: twitter
  #    text: Twitter/X
  #    href: https://twitter.com/yangxun_96
  #  - icon: github
  #    text: Github
  #    href: https://github.com/yangxun96
---

Welcome! I am a postdoctoral research fellow at the Department of Economics, University of [Warwick](https://warwick.ac.uk/fac/soc/economics/). I obtained my PhD in Economics from [CEMFI](https://www.cemfi.es/index.asp) in 2024.

I am a development economist with research interests in **political economy**, **health economics**, and **labour economics**. Methodologically, I utilize quasi-experimental approaches alongside experimental and structural estimation tools.

You can find my [CV](https://yangxun96.github.io/cv/CV_YangXun.pdf) and [research statement](https://yangxun.org/Research/research_statement.pdf) here.


**Contact Information**: 

<Yang.Xun@warwick.ac.uk>

Coventry CV4 7AL, United Kingdom
